meta.focus_summary_text:
🔥 Weekly AP Quant Radar — Technical Focus List

[AP-Clock]:
• $POWL 179/180 (rem 1d)
• $PPC 158/180 (rem 22d)

[ 📉 BREAKDOWNS (Below 200-SMA) ]
• $DY | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -3.8% | Vol 1.3x | Dycom Industries jumps after record Q4 results and strong backlog
• $EAT | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -8.4% | Vol 0.8x | Brinker International raises FY2026 outlook after earnings beat
• $CVSA | NEWS+BD200 | -14.0% | Vol 0.9x | Cimpress lifts full-year revenue and EBITDA outlook
• $CCL | NEWS+BD200 | -7.8% | Vol 2.1x | ER in 10d
• $OKTA | NEWS+BD200 | -12.4% | Vol 0.7x | Okta maintains buy ratings amid cybersecurity demand
• $SKYW | NEWS+BD200 | -10.5% | Vol 1.7x | SkyWest upgraded by analysts amid partnership outlook
• $W | NEWS+BD200 | -20.1% | Vol 0.7x | Wayfair receives multiple analyst price-target cuts

[ 🚀 STRENGTH (Above 200-SMA) ]
• $AGX | NEWS+X200 | +61.1% | Vol 1.8x | Argan valuation debated after recent pullback

🎯 Triggers: OKTA > 78.82 (EMA21) | CVSA > 100.86 (EMA21) | EAT > 147.40 (EMA21)

focus_view_model.news_headline: Dycom Industries jumps after record Q4 results and strong backlog
focus_view_model.news_summary: Dycom reported record quarterly revenue and backlog with strong forward telecom infrastructure demand expectations.

logic_pillars.technical: Price 356.81 remains below EMA21=399.20, EMA55=384.83 and SMA200=374.80 confirming F3 downtrend despite strong fundamentals.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.70 indicates limited institutional confirmation of the earnings reaction.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: Record results and backlog provide strong forward demand visibility.

focus_view_model.divergence: Fundamental strength conflicts with a technical downtrend as price 356.81 trades below all key moving averages.
focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for price reclaim of SMA200 374.80 to confirm post-earnings trend reversal.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Dycom Industries jumps after record Q4 results and strong backlog · 2d · 3 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Brinker International raises FY2026 outlook after earnings beat
focus_view_model.news_summary: Management lifted revenue and EPS outlook following strong operating performance at Chili's.

logic_pillars.technical: Price 134.71 remains below EMA21=148.37, EMA55=150.43 and SMA200=150.22 confirming F3 downtrend.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.95 suggests steady interest but no institutional breakout.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: Raised guidance supports a potential recovery narrative.

focus_view_model.divergence: SA Buy rating contrasts with a persistent downtrend as price remains below all major moving averages.
focus_view_model.action_plan: First technical recovery signal requires reclaiming EMA21 148.37.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Brinker International raises FY2026 outlook after earnings beat · 3d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Cimpress lifts full-year revenue and EBITDA outlook
focus_view_model.news_summary: Management raised forward growth and profitability expectations tied to operational efficiency improvements.

logic_pillars.technical: Price 102.04 sits above EMA21=100.74 but below EMA55=104.30 and SMA200=118.88 indicating early reversal attempt within downtrend.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.83 suggests moderate participation without institutional conviction yet.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: Upgraded outlook may trigger valuation re-rating.

focus_view_model.divergence: Technical downtrend conflicts with improving guidance and early EMA21 reclaim.
focus_view_model.action_plan: Break above EMA55 104.30 would confirm bullish pivot.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Cimpress lifts full-year revenue and EBITDA outlook · 4d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Carnival pressured as Middle East tensions push oil prices higher
focus_view_model.news_summary: Rising geopolitical tensions increased fuel cost concerns and travel demand uncertainty for cruise operators.

logic_pillars.technical: Price 25.79 remains below EMA21=30.07, EMA55=30.08 and SMA200=28.59 confirming strong downtrend.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.36 indicates elevated selling activity and institutional distribution.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: Geopolitical risk negatively impacts cruise sector sentiment.

focus_view_model.divergence: High-volume decline confirms institutional risk-off positioning despite valuation arguments.
focus_view_model.action_plan: Avoid longs unless price reclaims SMA200 28.59.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Carnival pressured as Middle East tensions push oil prices higher · 4d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Argan valuation debated after recent pullback
focus_view_model.news_summary: After strong annual gains, shares cooled as investors reassessed backlog monetization and valuation levels.

logic_pillars.technical: Price 413.94 remains above SMA200=288.18 and EMA55=383.45 but slightly below EMA21=420.25 indicating pullback within broader uptrend.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.60 suggests low-volume profit taking rather than distribution.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: Market evaluating backlog visibility versus valuation.

focus_view_model.divergence: Short-term EMA21 weakness contrasts with strong long-term uptrend.
focus_view_model.action_plan: Monitor support at EMA55 383.45 for trend continuation entry.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Argan valuation debated after recent pullback · 1d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Okta maintains buy ratings amid cybersecurity demand
focus_view_model.news_summary: Analysts maintain bullish outlook due to strong identity security demand.

logic_pillars.technical: Price 80.72 sits above EMA21=78.73 but below EMA55=83.12 and SMA200=91.18 showing relative strength inside a downtrend.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: Continued analyst support for cybersecurity demand.

focus_view_model.divergence: Positive price bias above EMA21 conflicts with broader downtrend classification.
focus_view_model.action_plan: Upside confirmation requires breakout above EMA55 83.12.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Okta maintains buy ratings amid cybersecurity demand · 3d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: SkyWest upgraded by analysts amid partnership outlook
focus_view_model.news_summary: Analysts highlight improving airline partnerships and staffing outlook.

logic_pillars.technical: Price 92.03 remains below EMA21=101.64, EMA55=101.87 and SMA200=104.16 confirming downtrend.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.27 shows strong trading activity consistent with selling pressure.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: Analyst upgrade provides counter-narrative to weak price action.

focus_view_model.divergence: High volume selling contradicts positive analyst outlook.
focus_view_model.action_plan: No long bias until price reclaims EMA21 101.64.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: SkyWest upgraded by analysts amid partnership outlook · 2d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Wayfair receives multiple analyst price-target cuts
focus_view_model.news_summary: Analysts lowered price targets reflecting weaker consumer demand outlook.

logic_pillars.technical: Price 76.18 trades below EMA21=82.82, EMA55=91.58 and SMA200=94.97 confirming downtrend.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.57 indicates weak participation and lack of institutional support.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: See external_intel: Analyst target reductions weigh on sentiment.

focus_view_model.divergence: Low volume and negative analyst sentiment align with technical weakness.
